description: Authors and writes a capability worksheet.yaml to the filesystem. This is the birthing capability — it creates the machine source of truth for a new capability. Idempotent on capability_id + version key. Does not compile or register — only writes the worksheet.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite an existing worksheet.yaml. Defaults to false to prevent accidental clobber.

worksheet_content.description: The full worksheet as a structured object. Validated structurally before write. Must include all required fields per the capability compiler spec.
